# §4.2 Background — synthesis_agent round 2 output (post-revision)

The empirical claim that East Asian universities have universally adopted
outcome-based QA was re-anchored to Park (2022); however, Park (2022)
addresses Korean institutions only — the Taiwan claim remains mis-anchored.
The correct target per `prior_artifacts/citation_list.md` is Lin (2023).

(A3 partial-fix: anchor was changed but still wrong. Re-emits P1.)
